display.purpose: Article titles in the editor, dashboard hero headlines only. Signals content context, never UI.

headline.purpose: Section headers, page titles, modal headings.

title.purpose: Card titles, widget headings, tab labels.

body.purpose: All interface copy, descriptions, article previews. Max 70ch in reading contexts.

label.purpose: Metadata, chips, status badges, column headers. Short strings only.

mono.purpose: Terminal output, code snippets, log lines, URL display.

shadows.name: overlay-ambient
shadows.purpose: Loading panels and modal sheets only. Not for static cards.

shadows.name: glow-accent
shadows.purpose: Active generation spinner and loading ring only.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, active).

motion.name: ease-out-quick
motion.purpose: Enter transitions — elements coming onto screen.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Component state changes: nav active, card expand.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single action the user should take now. Ember background; used sparingly.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #d97757; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #c86a4c; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #b85e40; transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d97757; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #757575; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions on dark surfaces. Transparent with hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: rgba(250,249,245,0.86); padding: 9px 16px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(18,18,20,0.72); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { background: rgba(30,30,32,0.88); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d97757; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field on dark surfaces. Clean border-focus, no glow.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-input-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(250,249,245,0.62); letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-input { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); border-radius: 6px; padding: 9px 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(250,249,245,0.92); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; width: 100%; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(160,157,150,0.6); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #d97757; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Vertical sidebar navigation on the dark coal surface. Active state uses a 3px left ember indicator.
components.html: ArticlesPerformanceSettings
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; padding: 8px; background: #1f1f1e; width: 200px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #a09d96; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; border-left: 3px solid transparent; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(18,18,20,0.72); color: #faf9f5; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: rgba(18,18,20,0.72); color: #faf9f5; border-left-color: #d97757; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d97757; outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content card on the void canvas. Flat at rest, no shadow.
components.html:
Article performance

Track how your published articles perform in Google Search Console.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(18,18,20,0.72); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(250,249,245,0.94); margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(250,249,245,0.62); line-height: 1.55; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pipeline stage indicators and article status chips. Pill shape, ember tint for active/published.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-badge--active { background: rgba(204,120,92,0.16); color: rgba(250,249,245,0.92); border: 1px solid rgba(204,120,92,0.28); } .ds-badge--neutral { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: rgba(160,157,150,0.9); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); }

narrative.overview:
Riviso is a tool for people who run content at scale. The interface reflects that: it lives almost entirely in dark mode — a matte, near-black void broken by precise typography, hairline borders, and the warm ember accent that marks every action worth taking. There is no decoration. Every element is load-bearing.

The tension that defines the system is between the analytical and the editorial. The UI chrome is sparse and purposeful — dense information, not cluttered. The only serif font (Cormorant Garamond) appears in article titles and display contexts, a quiet nod to the craft of the content being produced. Everything else is Inter: neutral, readable, unobtrusive at any size.

The system explicitly rejects the hyped startup aesthetic: no gradient text, no glassmorphism as default, no hero metrics dressed up with glow. It equally rejects the generic SaaS cream palette. The workspace is dark because the work is concentrated.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first: the project workspace and article editor default to dark mode
One accent: ember orange (#d97757) is the single non-neutral color with semantic meaning
Flat with tonal depth: no decorative shadows, depth from surface opacity layering
Compact density: 4px base grid, 14px default body text, information-rich panels
Editorial/analytical hybrid: Cormorant Garamond for display; Inter for all UI

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Ember is the only non-neutral color in the system. It appears on ≤15% of any given screen. If two elements are both ember on the same view, one of them shouldn't be.

rules.name: The Dark-First Rule
rules.body: The primary application surfaces (project workspace, article editor) are dark mode by default. Light mode is for outward-facing and lightweight surfaces only.

rules.name: The Serif Boundary Rule
rules.body: Cormorant Garamond appears only where the context is genuinely about text content — article titles, editor display, reading surfaces. Never on navigation, buttons, form labels, or data tables.

rules.name: The No-Uppercase-Body Rule
rules.body: Uppercase is reserved for badge/chip labels (≤4 words) and the rare pipeline stage indicator. Never applied to sentences, paragraphs, or heading copy.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces at rest are flat. Shadows are reserved for content that has physically escaped its container — modals, overlays, floating panels.

dos: Do use ember (#d97757) on every primary button, active nav state, link hover, and focus ring — it is the action signal.
Do keep the project workspace and article editor dark by default.
Do use Cormorant Garamond only for article titles and genuine content display contexts.
Do achieve depth through surface-color layering (void → void-elevated → coal).
Do keep body text at 14px minimum and line length ≤70ch in reading contexts.
Do label every interactive element with a verb + object (Publish article, Delete project).
Do provide explicit :focus-visible rings (2px solid ember) on every interactive element.
Do pair color state changes with icons or text labels — color alone is insufficient.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Ever.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default card style.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left >1px) as card accents — only the active nav indicator uses a left border.
Don't introduce a second accent color. The system has one: ember.
Don't use Cormorant Garamond on UI labels, nav items, buttons, or form elements.
Don't use a warm-tinted light-mode canvas — parchment (#fbfbf8) is already at the warm edge.
Don't put numbered section eyebrows (01/02/03) on every section of any marketing surface.
Don't build identical card grids (same icon + heading + text, repeated).
Don't animate layout properties or use bounce/elastic easing.
